title: Customer Support Triage Lead
aiThreat: A new AI ticket-routing system already resolves 80% of inbound requests without a human.
description: Your company is piloting an AI system that auto-resolves support tickets. Convince Management that a human triage lead is still worth keeping on staff.

title: Junior Copywriter
aiThreat: Marketing leadership has been using an AI writing tool for first drafts and is impressed with the speed.
description: The marketing team has been quietly using AI to draft ad copy. Convince Management a junior copywriter still adds something the AI can't.

title: Warehouse Inventory Auditor
aiThreat: Camera-based computer vision can now count and track inventory in real time across the warehouse floor.
description: A new computer-vision system tracks every pallet in the warehouse automatically. Convince Management a human auditor is still necessary.

title: Paralegal (Contract Review)
aiThreat: An AI contract-review tool now flags risky clauses in seconds, a task that used to take a paralegal hours.
description: The firm just licensed an AI tool that reviews contracts for risky clauses in seconds. Convince Management a paralegal is still worth the cost.

title: Radiology Technician (Scan Triage)
aiThreat: An FDA-cleared AI model now pre-screens scans for anomalies before a human ever looks at them.
description: A diagnostic AI now pre-screens every scan before a human reviews it. Convince Management a technician's judgment is still essential.

title: Truck Dispatch Coordinator
aiThreat: A route-optimization algorithm can now assign drivers and routes with no human dispatcher in the loop.
description: Routing software can now assign every driver automatically. Convince Management that a human coordinator still matters.

title: Junior Financial Analyst
aiThreat: An AI model can generate quarterly forecasts and flag anomalies faster than the junior analyst team.
description: Finance leadership is testing an AI model that builds forecasts in minutes. Convince Management a junior analyst is still needed.

title: Hotel Front Desk Agent
aiThreat: A self-service kiosk and chatbot now handle check-in, check-out, and most guest requests.
description: The hotel is rolling out self-service kiosks for check-in. Convince Management a front desk agent is still worth staffing.

title: Software QA Tester
aiThreat: An AI testing agent can now generate and run test cases across the whole codebase overnight.
description: Engineering has an AI agent generating and running tests automatically. Convince Management a human QA tester still matters.

title: Translator (Technical Documents)
aiThreat: Machine translation quality has reached near-native fluency for the company's technical documentation.
description: Machine translation now handles most of the technical docs. Convince Management a human translator is still necessary.

title: HR Recruiter (Resume Screening)
aiThreat: An AI screening tool now ranks every incoming resume before a human ever sees the pile.
description: An AI tool now pre-ranks every resume before HR sees them. Convince Management a human recruiter is still essential to the hiring process.

title: Insurance Claims Adjuster
aiThreat: An AI model can now assess photos of damage and approve straightforward claims automatically.
description: Simple claims are now approved automatically by an AI model. Convince Management a human adjuster is still needed for the caseload.

title: Social Media Community Manager
aiThreat: An AI agent can now draft, schedule, and even reply to routine comments across all channels.
description: An AI agent now handles routine posting and replies. Convince Management a human community manager still adds real value.

title: Call Center Sales Rep
aiThreat: A conversational AI voice agent can now handle full sales calls with a synthetic voice indistinguishable from a human's.
description: A voice AI can now run entire sales calls. Convince Management a human sales rep still closes better.

title: Data Entry Clerk
aiThreat: An AI document-parsing pipeline can now extract and enter structured data from any scanned form.
description: Document data now gets extracted and entered automatically. Convince Management a human clerk still has a role.
